description: Mappings from PostureIQ evidence types to NIST 800-53 controls

controls.title: Account Management
controls.rationale: Proper account management ensures only authorized users have access to systems.
controls.recommendation: Review and document all privileged accounts. Implement regular access reviews.

controls.title: Access Enforcement
controls.rationale: Access enforcement mechanisms ensure the principle of least privilege is applied.
controls.recommendation: Implement RBAC and Conditional Access policies to enforce access controls.

controls.title: Least Privilege
controls.rationale: Least privilege limits user access to only what is required for their job function.
controls.recommendation: Minimize Owner/Contributor/Global Admin assignments. Use custom roles.

controls.title: Event Logging
controls.rationale: Event logging enables detection and investigation of security events.
controls.recommendation: Enable diagnostic settings on all resources that support them.

controls.title: Audit Record Review, Analysis, and Reporting
controls.rationale: Regular review of audit records helps detect anomalies and security incidents.
controls.recommendation: Configure Log Analytics workspaces and review logs regularly.

controls.title: Continuous Monitoring
controls.rationale: Continuous monitoring maintains awareness of security posture over time.
controls.recommendation: Implement Azure Policy for continuous compliance and enable Azure Monitor.

controls.title: Baseline Configuration
controls.rationale: Baseline configurations ensure consistent and secure deployments.
controls.recommendation: Use Azure Policy initiatives to enforce baseline configurations.

controls.title: Identification and Authentication (Organizational Users)
controls.rationale: Strong authentication mechanisms prevent unauthorized access.
controls.recommendation: Enforce MFA for all users via Conditional Access policies.

controls.title: Authenticator Management
controls.rationale: Proper authenticator management prevents credential-based attacks.
controls.recommendation: Implement password policies, rotate credentials, and use managed identities.

controls.title: Vulnerability Monitoring and Scanning
controls.rationale: Vulnerability scanning identifies weaknesses before they can be exploited.
controls.recommendation: Enable Microsoft Defender for Cloud and configure vulnerability assessments.

controls.title: Boundary Protection
controls.rationale: Network boundaries prevent unauthorized external access and lateral movement.
controls.recommendation: Implement NSGs, Azure Firewall, and private endpoints.

controls.title: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity
controls.rationale: Data in transit must be protected from interception and tampering.
controls.recommendation: Enforce HTTPS/TLS for all communications.

controls.title: Protection of Information at Rest
controls.rationale: Encryption at rest protects stored data from unauthorized access.
controls.recommendation: Enable encryption at rest for all storage services.

controls.title: MFA Registration Coverage
controls.rationale: All users must be registered for multi-factor authentication.
controls.recommendation: Enforce MFA registration via Conditional Access. Target 90%+ registration rate.

controls.title: System-Generated Alerts - Risky User Detection
controls.rationale: Identity Protection must detect and respond to risky users.
controls.recommendation: Enable Identity Protection risk policies. Remediate high-risk users.

controls.title: Use of External Information Systems
controls.rationale: Cross-tenant access policies must enforce MFA trust and restrict uncontrolled partner access.
controls.recommendation: Configure cross-tenant access with MFA trust. Restrict B2B collaboration to approved partners.

controls.title: Control Assessments - Policy Compliance
controls.rationale: Azure Policy compliance state must be monitored.
controls.recommendation: Remediate non-compliant resources. Target 80%+ compliance rate.

controls.title: System Monitoring - Defender Plans
controls.rationale: Defender for Cloud must be enabled for all critical workloads.
controls.recommendation: Enable all Defender plans. Configure auto-provisioning and security contacts.

controls.title: Privileged Account Management - PIM
controls.rationale: PIM role activation must require MFA and justification.
controls.recommendation: Require MFA and justification for PIM activations. Limit duration to 8 hours.

controls.title: Automated Audit Actions - Access Reviews
controls.rationale: Periodic access reviews ensure role assignments remain appropriate.
controls.recommendation: Configure recurring access reviews for privileged roles.

controls.title: Cryptographic Protection - VM Security
controls.rationale: VMs must have encrypted disks, managed identity, and security agents.
controls.recommendation: Enable disk encryption, managed identity, and MDE extension on all VMs.

controls.title: Cryptographic Protection - Web App Security
controls.rationale: Web apps must enforce HTTPS, TLS 1.2+, disable FTP and remote debugging.
controls.recommendation: Enable HTTPS-only. Set minimum TLS to 1.2. Disable FTP and remote debugging.

controls.title: Offline Storage - SQL Security
controls.rationale: SQL Servers must use Azure AD auth, auditing, TDE, and restrict public access.
controls.recommendation: Configure Azure AD admin, auditing, TDE, and disable public network access.

controls.title: Least Functionality - AKS Security
controls.rationale: AKS clusters must enforce RBAC, AAD, network policies, and Defender.
controls.recommendation: Enable RBAC, AAD, network policy, private cluster, and Defender for Containers.

controls.title: Restrict Incoming Communications - Firewall
controls.rationale: Azure Firewalls must have threat intelligence and rule collections.
controls.recommendation: Enable threat intelligence filtering. Configure network and application rules.

controls.title: Isolation of Security Tools - Route Security
controls.rationale: Route tables must enforce controlled routing and flow logs must be enabled.
controls.recommendation: Configure default routes to firewall. Enable NSG flow logs with traffic analytics.

controls.title: Automated Process Integration - Monitoring Coverage
controls.rationale: Centralized monitoring infrastructure must be in place for incident response.
controls.recommendation: Ensure Log Analytics retention is 90+ days. Configure alert rules and action groups.

controls.title: Managed Identity Hygiene
controls.rationale: Managed identities must be actively used; orphaned identities expand attack surface.
controls.recommendation: Review and remove orphaned user-assigned managed identities.

controls.title: AI Services Data Protection
controls.rationale: Cognitive Services accounts must enforce network isolation, managed identity auth, and encryption.
controls.recommendation: Disable public access, disable local auth, enable CMK encryption, and use managed identities.

controls.title: Resource Group Governance
controls.rationale: Resource groups must be tagged for inventory control and governance.
controls.recommendation: Apply mandatory tags to all resource groups.

controls.title: AI Model Deployment Governance
controls.rationale: AI deployments require content filtering and rate limits for responsible AI governance.
controls.recommendation: Assign content filter policies and configure rate limits on all AI deployments.

controls.title: ML Workspace Network Isolation
controls.rationale: ML workspaces must use private endpoints and disable public access.
controls.recommendation: Disable public network access. Configure private endpoints.

controls.title: Storage Account Cryptographic Protection
controls.rationale: Storage accounts must enforce encryption, TLS 1.2, soft delete, and network rules.
controls.recommendation: Enable HTTPS, TLS 1.2, soft delete, and configure firewall.

controls.title: Container Registry Least Functionality
controls.rationale: Container registries must use least-privilege access with no admin accounts.
controls.recommendation: Disable admin user. Enable content trust. Use private endpoints.

controls.title: Container App Boundary Protection
controls.rationale: Container Apps must enforce secure ingress and managed identity.
controls.recommendation: Disable insecure connections. Enable managed identity.

controls.title: Cosmos DB Cryptographic Protection
controls.rationale: Cosmos DB must disable local auth, enforce network isolation, and use CMK.
controls.recommendation: Disable local auth. Use private endpoints. Enable CMK.

controls.title: Database Server Protection
controls.rationale: Database servers must disable public access and enable HA with geo-redundant backup.
controls.recommendation: Disable public access. Enable HA. Enable geo-redundant backup.

controls.title: Application Gateway WAF Boundary Protection
controls.rationale: Application Gateways must enable WAF in Prevention mode with TLS 1.2.
controls.recommendation: Enable WAF in Prevention mode. Set minimum TLS to 1.2.

controls.title: API Management Transmission Confidentiality
controls.rationale: APIM must disable legacy TLS/SSL and use VNet integration.
controls.recommendation: Disable TLS 1.0/1.1. Configure VNet. Enable managed identity.

controls.title: Storage Container Access Control
controls.rationale: Storage containers must not allow anonymous public access.
controls.recommendation: Set container access to Private. Configure lifecycle management.

controls.title: SQL Server Advanced Threat Detection and Auditing
controls.rationale: SQL Servers must enable ATP, vulnerability assessment, and per-database auditing.
controls.recommendation: Enable ATP. Configure vulnerability assessment. Verify per-database auditing.

controls.title: Web Application Remote Access Protection
controls.rationale: Web Apps must enable authentication, restrict CORS, and configure IP restrictions.
controls.recommendation: Enable App Service Auth. Restrict CORS. Add IP restrictions.

controls.title: Database Server Audit Configuration
controls.rationale: Database servers must enforce secure transport and audit logging.
controls.recommendation: Enable require_secure_transport. Enable log_checkpoints and audit logging.

controls.title: Container Registry Image Configuration Management
controls.rationale: Container registries must enforce tag immutability and clean up stale images.
controls.recommendation: Enable tag immutability. Remove stale repositories.

controls.title: Incident Handling
controls.rationale: Organizations must detect security incidents using automated mechanisms.
controls.recommendation: Enable Defender for Cloud plans and configure alert rules for incident detection.

controls.title: Incident Monitoring
controls.rationale: Incident monitoring requires alerting infrastructure with notification receivers.
controls.recommendation: Configure action groups with email/SMS receivers linked to alert rules.

controls.title: Incident Reporting
controls.rationale: Security contacts must be configured for incident reporting and breach notification.
controls.recommendation: Configure security contacts with email and alert notifications enabled.

controls.title: Incident Response Plan
controls.rationale: Incident response plans require logging and analytics infrastructure for investigation.
controls.recommendation: Deploy Log Analytics workspaces and ensure diagnostic coverage for forensic readiness.

controls.title: Configuration Change Control
controls.rationale: Configuration changes must be controlled through policies with deny/audit effects.
controls.recommendation: Assign policies with deny effects for unauthorized changes.

controls.title: Access Restrictions for Change
controls.rationale: Resource locks prevent unauthorized modifications to critical resources.
controls.recommendation: Apply CanNotDelete or ReadOnly locks on production resources.

controls.title: Configuration Change Tracking
controls.rationale: Changes to system configuration must be tracked and auditable.
controls.recommendation: Route activity logs to Log Analytics for change audit trail.

controls.title: Configuration Policy Enforcement
controls.rationale: Policy compliance rate indicates effectiveness of configuration enforcement.
controls.recommendation: Achieve and maintain policy compliance rate above 80%.

controls.title: Contingency Plan
controls.rationale: Contingency planning requires backup infrastructure with data protection.
controls.recommendation: Deploy Recovery Services vaults with soft delete enabled.

controls.title: Alternate Storage Site
controls.rationale: Data must be replicated to geographically separate locations.
controls.recommendation: Use geo-redundant storage (GRS/RA-GRS) and multi-region database replication.

controls.title: System Backup
controls.rationale: VMs must use availability zones or sets for system resilience.
controls.recommendation: Deploy VMs in availability zones or availability sets.

controls.title: System Recovery and Reconstitution
controls.rationale: Databases must support recovery with geo-replication and HA features.
controls.recommendation: Enable high availability and geo-replication for production databases.

controls.title: Updates During Installation and Removal
controls.rationale: Asset inventory must be updated when resources are deployed or removed.
controls.recommendation: Ensure automated resource discovery and inventory management.

controls.title: System Inventory
controls.rationale: Maintain an inventory of all organizational applications and service principals.
controls.recommendation: Review and document all application registrations and service principals.

controls.title: Security Categorization
controls.rationale: Resources must be categorized based on data sensitivity using classification tags.
controls.recommendation: Apply data classification tags to all resources.

controls.title: Session Termination
controls.rationale: Sessions must be terminated after inactivity or when no longer needed.
controls.recommendation: Configure CA policies with sign-in frequency and persistent browser controls.

controls.title: Service Principal Hygiene
controls.rationale: Service principals must have valid credentials, assigned owners, and no active risk signals.
controls.recommendation: Rotate expired credentials and investigate risky service principals.

controls.title: Audit Record Retention
controls.rationale: Audit records must be retained for a minimum period to support investigations.
controls.recommendation: Configure Log Analytics retention to at least 90 days.

controls.title: Automated Response to Suspicious Events
controls.rationale: Alert rules must be linked to action groups for automated incident response.
controls.recommendation: Link all alert rules to action groups with notification receivers.

controls.title: Security Awareness Training
controls.rationale: Personnel must acknowledge security policies through Terms of Use and training.
controls.recommendation: Configure Entra ID Terms of Use and enforce CA policy acceptance.

controls.title: Authorized Software Policy
controls.rationale: Only authorized resource types and services should be deployable.
controls.recommendation: Assign policies restricting allowed resource types and locations.

controls.title: Boundary Protection - Function App Security
controls.rationale: Function apps must enforce HTTPS, minimum TLS, and use managed identities.
controls.recommendation: Enforce HTTPS-only, TLS 1.2+, and enable managed identity on all function apps.

controls.title: Transmission Confidentiality - Messaging Services
controls.rationale: Messaging services must enforce TLS and disable local authentication.
controls.recommendation: Disable local auth, enforce TLS 1.2, and use private endpoints for messaging.

controls.title: Protection of Information at Rest - Cache Security
controls.rationale: Redis caches must enforce SSL and restrict network access.
controls.recommendation: Enable SSL, set TLS 1.2+, and use private endpoints for Redis.

controls.title: Protection of Information - CosmosDB Advanced
controls.rationale: Cosmos DB must disable local auth and enforce network restrictions.
controls.recommendation: Disable key-based auth, use Azure AD RBAC, and configure private endpoints.

controls.title: Boundary Protection - Data Analytics
controls.rationale: Data analytics services must use managed VNets and restrict public access.
controls.recommendation: Enable managed VNet for Synapse, disable public access for ADF, and enable no-public-IP for Databricks.

controls.title: Transmission of Security Attributes - DNS
controls.rationale: DNS infrastructure must use secure monitoring and HTTPS health probes.
controls.recommendation: Use HTTPS for Traffic Manager health monitoring. Prefer private DNS zones.

controls.title: Boundary Protection - AKS Advanced
controls.rationale: AKS clusters must use AAD RBAC, network policies, and private API servers.
controls.recommendation: Enable AAD RBAC, configure network policies, and use private clusters.

controls.title: Boundary Protection - API Management
controls.rationale: APIM must use VNet integration and store secrets in Key Vault.
controls.recommendation: Deploy APIM in VNet mode and store named value secrets in Key Vault.

controls.title: Boundary Protection - Front Door and CDN
controls.rationale: Front Door profiles must have WAF policies in Prevention mode.
controls.recommendation: Attach WAF policies to Front Door profiles and set mode to Prevention.

controls.title: Incident Handling - Sentinel Monitoring
controls.rationale: Sentinel must be configured with data connectors and analytics rules.
controls.recommendation: Deploy Sentinel with data connectors, analytics rules, and automation playbooks.

controls.title: Incident Monitoring - Alert Response
controls.rationale: Security alerts must have configured notification and response workflows.
controls.recommendation: Configure action groups for alerts and triage open Sentinel incidents.

controls.title: Continuous Monitoring - Defender Posture
controls.rationale: Secure Score must be above 70% and unhealthy assessments addressed.
controls.recommendation: Address Defender recommendations and improve secure score above 70%.

controls.title: AI Content Safety
controls.rationale: AI deployments must have content filter policies configured.
controls.recommendation: Configure content filters and blocklists for all AI model deployments.

controls.title: Regulatory Compliance Assessment
controls.rationale: Regulatory compliance standards should maintain above 70% pass rate.
controls.recommendation: Review and improve regulatory compliance assessment results.

controls.title: Identification - Workload Identity
controls.rationale: Workload identities should use federation instead of password credentials.
controls.recommendation: Migrate from password credentials to workload identity federation.

controls.title: Authenticator Management - Methods
controls.rationale: Weak auth methods (SMS, voice) should be disabled.
controls.recommendation: Disable SMS/voice OTP and enable phishing-resistant auth methods.

controls.title: Identifier Management - Managed Identities
controls.rationale: Orphaned managed identity service principals should be cleaned up.
controls.recommendation: Review and remove orphaned managed identity service principals.

controls.title: Data Classification and Protection
controls.rationale: Data classification through Purview ensures proper data handling.
controls.recommendation: Configure Purview and sensitivity labels for data classification.
